## Source plugin: `bootimg_efi`

Creates an EFI boot partition. Supports GRUB 2 and systemd-boot bootloaders.

Use `--sourceparams` to select the bootloader:

- `--sourceparams="loader=grub-efi"`: Use GRUB 2 for EFI boot.
- `--sourceparams="loader=systemd-boot"`: Use systemd-boot.

Common usage:

```
part /boot --source bootimg_efi --sourceparams="loader=grub-efi" --ondisk sda --label msdos --active --align 1024
```
